steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We have a speed of $\frac{3}{50}$ feet per second and need yards per second. The given ratio is 3 feet = 1 yard, so dividing feet by 3 converts to yards.

steps.title: Apply the conversion
steps.content:
Divide the speed by 3:
$$\frac{3}{50} \div 3 = \frac{3}{50 \cdot 3} = \frac{1}{50}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
